title: IT Engineer, Data Center (Shift work)
description:
Our client is a leading data center and digital infrastructure company in Singapore. Due to rapid expansion plans, they are seeking for multiple  IT Engineer who to manage all Data Center Facilities Infrastructure located in the west area.

Location: West area

Shift role: 12 hours rotational shift required  

Responsibilities:

·       Responsible for the DC centralized network operations management

·       Responding to incidents reports or escalating to 2nd or 3rd level resolution based on urgency and complexity

·       System management on customer request or electronic visitation

·       Benchmarking against system performance between all DCs for meeting presentation to management

·       Ensure all system data collected are accurate

·       Familiar with all system MOP/SOP to provide system recovery solutions

·       Responsible for DC Facilities Management

·       Monitoring all data center facilities infrastructure to ensure it is in normal function (UPS, power, temperature control, humidity, water detection sensor etc)

·       Ensure all DC supporting infrastructure (Building Monitoring System, Environment Monitoring System, Access Control System, Electronic Visitation System) are functioning well

·       Stakeholders’ coordination to resolve technical issues

·       Coordinating maintenance and shutdowns

·       Manage incident and closure including Root Cause analysis

·       Ensuring customers’ contractual service level agreements are met

Requirements:

·      Diploma in IT / Engineering with min 4 years of experience of DC Operations

·      Experienced in data center facilities and operations support

·      Possesses certificate of Infocomm Technology / ITIL Foundation level

·      Good communication skills and critical thinking

·      Comfortable with 12-hours rotational shift

For a confidential discussion please apply or email to serena@archerrecruitment.com

To view more roles within; construction, real estate, engineering, architecture or renewables, please visit our website: www.archerrecruitment.com, contact one of our specialist consultants http://archerrecruitment.com/about/our-people/ and/or 'follow' our LinkedIn page for regular industry updates.
 
We appreciate every application, however, due to a high volume of applicants, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
 
EA Licence No: 17C8952  |  R2197282

postedCompany.description:
ARCHER RECRUITMENT PTE. LTD.

Archer Recruitment is an expert search consultancy focusing in the construction, engineering, property, supply chain and oil & gas industries throughout the Asia-Pacific and North America regions.

With a wide spanning reach that utilises our market expertise and strategic partnerships across Europe, MENA, North America and APAC, Archer Recruitment strives to develop true partnerships with both clients and candidates and to deliver an un-paralleled experience to all stakeholders in the recruitment process.

Whether we are working on a retained search, contingency search or interim assignment, this focused approach gives our partners access to the highest calibre of talent in the market and the leading opportunities.
